overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

London

Arrive in the vibrant capital of England, where history meets modern sophistication. Upon landing, our dedicated Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you, ensuring a seamless pick-up and drop-off for a hassle-free experience. Enjoy the best on-ground support as you are comfortably transferred to your hotel, catching glimpses of London’s iconic landmarks along the way. After check-in, relax in the luxurious comforts of your accommodation. In the evening, savor a delightful dinner while admiring the city’s enchanting skyline. With our expert guidance get ready to explore a city brimming with royal heritage, cultural wonders, and unforgettable experiences.

IBIS LONDON WEMBLEY

​After a delightful breakfast, set out on an exhilarating city tour with your Travelxploria representative and expert guide, ensuring a seamless experience. Explore London’s most iconic landmarks, including Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Trafalgar Square, and the majestic Tower Bridge. Witness the grandeur of Buckingham Palace and, if lucky, experience the iconic Changing of the Guard ceremony. Cricket enthusiasts will relish an exclusive visit to Lord’s Cricket Ground, delving into its rich history, the Pavilion, and the legendary Ashes Urn, followed by a delicious lunch at this historic venue. Later, marvel at the breathtaking panoramic views from the London Eye, offering a spectacular perspective of the city skyline and the River Thames. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

After a delightful breakfast, begin your day with a visit to the world-renowned Madame Tussauds, where you can capture memorable moments alongside lifelike wax figures of celebrities, historical icons, and sports legends. Your dedicated Travelxploria representative will then ensure a seamless transfer to the station for your high-speed Eurostar journey. Relax and enjoy the scenic views of the English and French countryside as you travel in comfort. Upon arrival in Paris—the city of romance and culture—experience its timeless charm. After a smooth hotel check-in, savor a delicious dinner and unwind.Overnight stay in Paris.

GREET PARIS PORTE ITALIE

Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on a guided city tour of Paris with your expert Travelxploria representative. Witness the grandeur of Place Vendôme, Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, the iconic Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, and Les Invalides. Ascend to the 3rd level of the Eiffel Tower for breathtaking panoramic views of the City of Lights. After a delicious lunch, explore the majestic Palace of Versailles, renowned for its opulent halls and enchanting gardens. Return to Paris for a sumptuous dinner before unwinding at your hotel.Overnight stay in Paris.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before venturing into the wonders of Disneyland Paris. Choose between two captivating parks—Disney Park, where fairy tales come to life with thrilling rides, vibrant parades, and beloved Disney characters, or Walt Disney Studios Park, offering breathtaking stunt shows and behind-the-scenes movie magic. After a delicious lunch, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, gliding past Paris’ most iconic landmarks. As night falls, embark on the enchanting Paris by Night tour, witnessing the illuminated Eiffel Tower, Notre-Dame, and Champs-Élysées. End this magical day with a sumptuous dinner before retiring to your hotel. Overnight stay in Paris.

Amsterdam

Start your day with a hearty breakfast before journeying to Brussels, the vibrant capital of Belgium and the heart of the European Union. Upon arrival, explore the breathtaking Grand Place, a UNESCO-listed square adorned with magnificent guild houses and the iconic Town Hall. Visit the famous Manneken Pis statue, a quirky yet beloved symbol of the city. After a delightful lunch, venture to Mini Europe, where over 350 intricately crafted miniature monuments bring the continent’s most famous landmarks to life. As the day winds down, savor a delicious dinner before traveling comfortably to the Netherlands.Overnight stay in the Netherlands.

Frankfurt

Enjoy a delightful breakfast before setting out on a scenic journey to Lisse, home to the breathtaking Keukenhof Gardens. Wander through a mesmerizing landscape of vibrant tulips, daffodils, and hyacinths, creating a spectacular display of color and fragrance. If Keukenhof is not in season, explore a charming Dutch village near Amsterdam, where traditional windmills, wooden houses, and artisan workshops showcase the rich heritage of the Netherlands. After a delightful lunch, embark on a glass-topped boat cruise through Amsterdam’s picturesque canals. Later, continue your journey to Germany, checking into your hotel in the Frankfurt area. Enjoy a delicious dinner and overnight stay.

Zurich

After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a scenic journey to Heidelberg, where the charming Old Town (Altstadt) awaits. Wander through its cobblestone streets, admire historic houses, and visit the iconic Church of the Holy Spirit, all set beneath the grandeur of Heidelberg Castle. Next, immerse yourself in the beauty of the Black Forest, known for its rolling hills and traditional villages. Witness a fascinating cuckoo clock-making demonstration, a hallmark of Black Forest craftsmanship. Later, journey to Switzerland to marvel at the mighty Rhine Falls, where a thrilling boat ride brings you close to Europe’s largest waterfall. As the day winds down, check in to your hotel in Central Switzerland and savor a delicious dinner before resting for the night.

Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport

After a delightful breakfast, set off on a picturesque journey to Interlaken, a charming Swiss town nestled between the stunning Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, offering breathtaking alpine views. Stroll through its quaint streets, soak in the serene beauty, and enjoy a hearty lunch. With your expert Travelxploria tour guide ensuring a seamless experience, continue to Jungfraujoch, the Top of Europe. From Grindelwald Terminal, board the state-of-the-art Eiger Express to Eigergletscher Station before switching to a cogwheel train that ascends to Europe’s highest railway station. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, carved entirely from ice, and take in spectacular views from the Sphinx Observatory, overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. As the day concludes, return comfortably to your hotel for a sumptuous dinner and a restful overnight stay.

After a hearty breakfast, embark on a breathtaking alpine adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and unforgettable experiences. Guided by our expert tour guide and representative, ascend to the majestic Mt. Titlis via a thrilling series of cable cars, including the world’s first rotating Rotair, offering stunning 360° views of the snow-capped Swiss Alps. Experience the adrenaline rush of walking across the Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge. Later, explore the picturesque city of Lucerne, where you’ll visit the iconic Lion Monument and stroll along the historic Kapellbrücke. Your journey continues with a delightful visit to the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where you’ll indulge in the rich flavors of Switzerland’s finest chocolates. Enjoy a sumptuous lunch and dinner before returning to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a relaxing overnight stay.

1
Days in
Innsbruck
1
Days in
Innsbruck
1
Days in
Innsbruck

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a scenic adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and enriching experiences, accompanied by our expert tour guide and representative. Begin your journey in Vaduz, the charming capital of Liechtenstein, one of the world’s smallest yet most picturesque countries nestled in the Alps. Enjoy a guided mini train ride, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the stunning landscape. Next, visit the world-renowned Swarovski Crystal World in Wattens, where dazzling crystalline masterpieces captivate visitors. Continue to Innsbruck, the enchanting capital of Tyrol, and stroll through Maria Theresien Strasse, lined with historic buildings and lively cafés. Marvel at the iconic Golden Roof, a symbol of Innsbruck’s medieval charm, set against a spectacular Alpine backdrop. After a day filled with beauty and culture, indulge in a sumptuous lunch and dinner before retiring for an overnight stay in Innsbruck.

Venice

After a delightful breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy, a city of timeless charm and romance. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, experience a seamless and luxurious adventure. Upon arrival at the pier, our Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will escort you on a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Explore the magnificent St. Mark’s Basilica, admire the Bell Tower and Clock Tower, and marvel at the iconic Bridge of Sighs, a symbol of Venetian history. To truly immerse yourself in the magic of Venice, enjoy a romantic gondola ride, gliding through its picturesque canals. After a day of exploration, indulge in a delicious lunch, check in at your hotel, and unwind over a delightful dinner. Overnight stay in Padova/Bologna/Ferrara

Florence

After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a guided tour of Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with an expert guide from Travelxploria, the best travel agency. Marvel at the city's most iconic landmark, the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, famous for its Gates of Paradise. Explore Piazza della Signoria, an open air museum adorned with Renaissance sculptures, and admire the Ponte Vecchio, the historic bridge spanning the River Arno. Next, journey to Pisa to witness the architectural wonder of the Leaning Tower of Pisa, set within the breathtaking Square of Miracles. After an enriching day, enjoy a delicious lunch and dinner before retiring for the night. Overnight stay in the Tuscany region.

Rome

After a delightful breakfast, check out and journey to Rome, the Eternal City, with an experienced Travelxploria guide ensuring a seamless experience. As the best travel agency, we present an immersive tour of Vatican City, the world’s smallest country. Explore the magnificent St. Peter’s Basilica, the awe-inspiring Sistine Chapel, and Michelangelo’s masterpiece, The Last Judgement. Next, enjoy a delicious lunch before visiting the iconic Colosseum, followed by the legendary Trevi Fountain, where tossing a coin is said to ensure your return. Discover the Victor Emmanuel Monument and the Roman Forum. If Vatican Museum entry is unavailable due to the Jubilee year, our dedicated representative will arrange Colosseum entry instead. End the day with a delightful dinner and an overnight stay in Rome.

Day 2 -London
London City Tour
Ticket Included
London City Tour
Ticket Included
London City Tour
Ticket Included
London City Tour
Ticket Included
London City Tour
Ticket Included

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Inclusion / Exclusion

Inclusions

  • Assistance on arrival and departure.
  • Accommodation on Twin sharing basis.
  • All Airport - Hotel - Airport transfers on Private basis.
  • All Tours & activities on sharing basis / Pvt
  • Vehicle will not be on disposal.
  • Daily breakfast at hotel.
  • Discover London
  • Paris City Tour – Timeless Elegance & Royal Grandeur
  • A Magical Day at Disneyland & Enchanting Paris
  • Amsterdam City Tour
  • Jungfraujoch & Interlaken – A Swiss Alpine Dream
  • Mt. Titlis Adventure & Lucerne Charm
  • Frankfurt City Tour
  • Innsbruck City Tour
  • Venice – The Enchanting Floating City
  • Florence & Pisa – A Journey Through Renaissance Splendor
  • Rome & Vatican City – A Timeless Journey

Exclusion

  • Bank charges, payment gateway charges.
  • Expenses of personal nature such as Laundry, telephone calls, tips, Liquor, Mineral water, Airport Tax, Insurance, Meal outside hotel etc.
  • Camera Charges.
  • Additional car usage beyond Itinerary.
  • Any supplementary service not mentioned in itinerary as a suggested addition such as water sports or any similar activity.
  • Any other item not specified in "Cost Includes".
  • Additional or incremental expenses arising out of acts of god, political disturbance, strike etc.
  • Any change in government tax structure and amount becoming due thereto.
  • Currency conversion charges.
  • Return Airfare
  • 5% TCS
  • 5% GST

day_details.day_title: A Magical Day at Disneyland & Enchanting Paris
day_details.day_summary: Start your day with a delightful breakfast before venturing into the wonders of Disneyland Paris. Choose between two captivating parks—Disney Park, where fairy tales come to life with thrilling rides, vibrant parades, and beloved Disney characters, or Walt Disney Studios Park, offering breathtaking stunt shows and behind-the-scenes movie magic. After a delicious lunch, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, gliding past Paris’ most iconic landmarks. As night falls, embark on the enchanting Paris by Night tour, witnessing the illuminated Eiffel Tower, Notre-Dame, and Champs-Élysées. End this magical day with a sumptuous dinner before retiring to your hotel. Overnight stay in Paris.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast before journeying to Brussels, the vibrant capital of Belgium and the heart of the European Union. Upon arrival, explore the breathtaking Grand Place, a UNESCO-listed square adorned with magnificent guild houses and the iconic Town Hall. Visit the famous Manneken Pis statue, a quirky yet beloved symbol of the city. After a delightful lunch, venture to Mini Europe, where over 350 intricately crafted miniature monuments bring the continent’s most famous landmarks to life. As the day winds down, savor a delicious dinner before traveling comfortably to the Netherlands.Overnight stay in the Netherlands.

day_details.day_title: From Tulip Fields to Canals: A Dutch Delight Before Germany
day_details.day_summary: Enjoy a delightful breakfast before setting out on a scenic journey to Lisse, home to the breathtaking Keukenhof Gardens. Wander through a mesmerizing landscape of vibrant tulips, daffodils, and hyacinths, creating a spectacular display of color and fragrance. If Keukenhof is not in season, explore a charming Dutch village near Amsterdam, where traditional windmills, wooden houses, and artisan workshops showcase the rich heritage of the Netherlands. After a delightful lunch, embark on a glass-topped boat cruise through Amsterdam’s picturesque canals. Later, continue your journey to Germany, checking into your hotel in the Frankfurt area. Enjoy a delicious dinner and overnight stay.

day_details.day_title: Heidelberg’s Charm, Black Forest Wonders & Rhine Falls Adventure
day_details.day_summary: After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a scenic journey to Heidelberg, where the charming Old Town (Altstadt) awaits. Wander through its cobblestone streets, admire historic houses, and visit the iconic Church of the Holy Spirit, all set beneath the grandeur of Heidelberg Castle. Next, immerse yourself in the beauty of the Black Forest, known for its rolling hills and traditional villages. Witness a fascinating cuckoo clock-making demonstration, a hallmark of Black Forest craftsmanship. Later, journey to Switzerland to marvel at the mighty Rhine Falls, where a thrilling boat ride brings you close to Europe’s largest waterfall. As the day winds down, check in to your hotel in Central Switzerland and savor a delicious dinner before resting for the night.

day_details.day_title: Jungfraujoch & Interlaken – A Swiss Alpine Dream
day_details.day_summary: After a delightful breakfast, set off on a picturesque journey to Interlaken, a charming Swiss town nestled between the stunning Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, offering breathtaking alpine views. Stroll through its quaint streets, soak in the serene beauty, and enjoy a hearty lunch. With your expert Travelxploria tour guide ensuring a seamless experience, continue to Jungfraujoch, the Top of Europe. From Grindelwald Terminal, board the state-of-the-art Eiger Express to Eigergletscher Station before switching to a cogwheel train that ascends to Europe’s highest railway station. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, carved entirely from ice, and take in spectacular views from the Sphinx Observatory, overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. As the day concludes, return comfortably to your hotel for a sumptuous dinner and a restful overnight stay.

After a hearty breakfast, embark on a breathtaking alpine adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and unforgettable experiences. Guided by our expert tour guide and representative, ascend to the majestic Mt. Titlis via a thrilling series of cable cars, including the world’s first rotating Rotair, offering stunning 360° views of the snow-capped Swiss Alps. Experience the adrenaline rush of walking across the Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge. Later, explore the picturesque city of Lucerne, where you’ll visit the iconic Lion Monument and stroll along the historic Kapellbrücke. Your journey continues with a delightful visit to the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where you’ll indulge in the rich flavors of Switzerland’s finest chocolates. Enjoy a sumptuous lunch and dinner before returning to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a relaxing overnight stay.

day_details.day_title: A Scenic Journey Through Liechtenstein & Austria
day_details.day_summary: After a delightful breakfast, embark on a scenic adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and enriching experiences, accompanied by our expert tour guide and representative. Begin your journey in Vaduz, the charming capital of Liechtenstein, one of the world’s smallest yet most picturesque countries nestled in the Alps. Enjoy a guided mini train ride, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the stunning landscape. Next, visit the world-renowned Swarovski Crystal World in Wattens, where dazzling crystalline masterpieces captivate visitors. Continue to Innsbruck, the enchanting capital of Tyrol, and stroll through Maria Theresien Strasse, lined with historic buildings and lively cafés. Marvel at the iconic Golden Roof, a symbol of Innsbruck’s medieval charm, set against a spectacular Alpine backdrop. After a day filled with beauty and culture, indulge in a sumptuous lunch and dinner before retiring for an overnight stay in Innsbruck.

day_details.day_summary: After a delightful breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy, a city of timeless charm and romance. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, experience a seamless and luxurious adventure. Upon arrival at the pier, our Travelxploria representative and experienced guide will escort you on a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Explore the magnificent St. Mark’s Basilica, admire the Bell Tower and Clock Tower, and marvel at the iconic Bridge of Sighs, a symbol of Venetian history. To truly immerse yourself in the magic of Venice, enjoy a romantic gondola ride, gliding through its picturesque canals. After a day of exploration, indulge in a delicious lunch, check in at your hotel, and unwind over a delightful dinner. Overnight stay in Padova/Bologna/Ferrara

4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438755-unnamed (15).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438824-unnamed (14).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438859-unnamed (13).jpg"}]

day_details.day_title: Florence & Pisa – A Journey Through Renaissance Splendor
day_details.day_summary: After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a guided tour of Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with an expert guide from Travelxploria, the best travel agency. Marvel at the city's most iconic landmark, the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, famous for its Gates of Paradise. Explore Piazza della Signoria, an open air museum adorned with Renaissance sculptures, and admire the Ponte Vecchio, the historic bridge spanning the River Arno. Next, journey to Pisa to witness the architectural wonder of the Leaning Tower of Pisa, set within the breathtaking Square of Miracles. After an enriching day, enjoy a delicious lunch and dinner before retiring for the night. Overnight stay in the Tuscany region.

4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956443-2024-07-01 (2).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956518-unnamed (40).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956623-2023-01-18.jpg"}]

day_details.day_title: Rome & Vatican City – A Timeless Journey
day_details.day_summary: After a delightful breakfast, check out and journey to Rome, the Eternal City, with an experienced Travelxploria guide ensuring a seamless experience. As the best travel agency, we present an immersive tour of Vatican City, the world’s smallest country. Explore the magnificent St. Peter’s Basilica, the awe-inspiring Sistine Chapel, and Michelangelo’s masterpiece, The Last Judgement. Next, enjoy a delicious lunch before visiting the iconic Colosseum, followed by the legendary Trevi Fountain, where tossing a coin is said to ensure your return. Discover the Victor Emmanuel Monument and the Roman Forum. If Vatican Museum entry is unavailable due to the Jubilee year, our dedicated representative will arrange Colosseum entry instead. End the day with a delightful dinner and an overnight stay in Rome.

As your extraordinary European journey comes to an end, it's time to say goodbye to the beautiful destinations made along the way. After a delightful breakfast, our Travelxploria representative and expert guide will assist you with a smooth check-out and transfer to the airport.
